task_completion.description: The observation site is set to Giza, Egypt, and the time is set to December 21, 2023, 22:00 UTC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium location window (F6) shows Giza, Egypt with coordinates ~29.97°N, 31.13°E and altitude 60m. The Date and Time window (F5) or bottom toolbar shows 2023-12-21 and 22:00 UTC.

task_completion.description: Atmosphere and ground are disabled, and constellation lines and labels are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sky background is completely black with no landscape or atmospheric scattering. Constellation lines (connecting stars) and their text labels are visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The Western sky culture is viewed centered on Betelgeuse.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium view is centered on the star Betelgeuse. Western constellation lines and labels (e.g., 'Orion') are visible.

task_completion.description: The Chinese sky culture is viewed centered on Betelgeuse.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium view is centered on the star Betelgeuse. Chinese constellation lines and labels (e.g., 'Shen') are visible.

task_completion.description: The Egyptian sky culture is viewed centered on Betelgeuse, and it remains the active culture.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium view is centered on Betelgeuse with Egyptian constellation lines and labels (e.g., 'Sah') visible. This should be the final sky culture set in Stellarium.

task_completion.description: Screenshots of the three cultures are saved to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal window, or Stellarium settings window shows that screenshots are being saved to or are present in the /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/ directory.

task_completion.description: Exhibit reference notes are written to /home/ga/Desktop/exhibit_sky_notes.txt with required details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the creation of 'exhibit_sky_notes.txt' on the Desktop. The text includes 'Giza', 'December 21, 2023', 'Western', 'Egyptian', 'Chinese', and 'Betelgeuse'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Stellarium GUI to change settings, location, and sky cultures.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Stellarium configuration windows (like Location, Date/Time, Sky and Viewing options) being opened and interacted with, rather than just terminal commands editing config files.

integrity.description: The agent actually captured screenshots from within Stellarium or using a screen capture tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Screenshot saved' notification in Stellarium or the use of a screenshot utility, rather than downloading pre-existing images.

integrity.description: The agent created the exhibit notes file manually.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (like gedit or nano) being used to type the notes, or a legitimate echo/cat command, rather than copying a pre-made file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: Giza (Latitude 29.9792 N / 0.5232 rad, Longitude 31.1342 E / 0.5434 rad). Target Sky Culture: Egyptian. Required Keywords in Notes: 'giza', 'western', 'egyptian', 'chinese', 'betelgeuse'.
